item.title: I blocked my emotionally abusive mother’s phone number. She messaged me through WhatsApp
item.description:
Yes, these are all photos of me. My literally sent me photos of me from her phone before she deletes them all. Last year, my mother disowned me when I tried to set boundaries. In my educated opinion, I believe my mother has borderline personality disorder. We have had a very rocky relationship throughout my life, with some periods being very good, but not recently. After she said I should only contact her if I want to apologize and admit everything bad I’ve done, she has continued to send me passive aggressive messages and try to goad me into interacting with her again. Back in May, she called me out of the blue and tried to corner me into another conversation. I ended up texting her a message afterwards, turning my phone off for a few hours, read her response, and then decided to finally completely block her number. Imagine my surprise when I get a notification from WhatsApp to 21 messages. The family used to have a group chat on there, so I guess she finally figured out that I had blocked her number. One of her last text messages (from last year) said that if I wanted a family, I should go find my biological family (I was adopted). She just keeps trying to hurt me. And unfortunately, it’s working.
Dog tag of my Pippin. Not sure what was going through my mind when I took this. I was feeling a little silly, I guess.
item.dc:creator: thetinytraveler

wow what a cool bat

her hat is pretty small for a dimmadome
big non fan of energy drinks
have you ever met someone who vehemently dislikes memes?
gotta crack em all
as is tradition
yes
not like right now, but over time there's been lots of em
the band is called System of a Down and he is Serj Tankian
big night
mmm hmm
that's a lot of space weed
shit yeah
holler at your boy
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: My mom spoke Spanish to my dog and he suddenly started listening
item.description:
I adopted my dog Earl back in May, and he has had some behavior issues since I adopted him. I love him, and I have been working hard to curb his bad behavior. However, my mother knows Spanish as she's a teacher, and some of her students need Spanish and English. Henceforth, tonight coming how she said, "siéntate" to him out of the blue, and suddenly, he immediately obeyed. Moreover, we got home and she said "beso" and he kissed her. Then, to seal the deal, she Googled how to say lie down in Spanish and spoke it to him, and he listened.
It was like night and day. I adopted him on May 13, 2024. He's such a good boy when he doesn't have the zoomies. But, holy shit, now that I know he speaks Spanish, I started speaking Spanish commands to him, and he was ecstatic and started listening.
item.dc:creator: zeacorzeppelin10

item.title: Dump #230

item.title: "No One Distanced Themselves from Me, Not One Single Person"
item.description: Gareth Thomas photo: By David Cameron and Gareth Thomas.jpg: ukhomeoffice derivative work: User:Tsange - File:David Cameron and Gareth Thomas.jpg, CC BY 2.5, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=16163610 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.5/ Sauce: Helen Weathers, “British Lions rugby legend Gareth Thomas: ‘It’s ended my marriage and nearly driven me to suicide. Now it’s time to tell the world the truth — I’m gay.’” Daily Mail. 19 December 2009 http://www.dailymail.co.uk/femail/article-1237035/British-Lions-rugby-legend-Gareth-Thomas-Its-ended-marriage-nearly-driven-suicide-Now-time-tell-world-truth--Im-gay.html#ixzz0aQBxfYOW “Gareth Thomas CBE (born 25 July 1974) is a Welsh former professional rugby union and rugby league player, who represented Wales in both codes. Nicknamed ‘Alfie’, he was the first Wales rugby union player to play in 100 test matches, and is currently the sixth-most capped Wales player. He is 15th among international try scorers, and is the third-highest Wales try scorer. He also won four rugby league caps for Wales, scoring three tries. “He played rugby union as a fullback, wing or centre for Bridgend, Cardiff, the Celtic Warriors, Toulouse, Cardiff Blues, and Wales. In 2010 he changed codes to rugby league when he transferred from Cardiff Blues to the Crusaders in Super League, and later played for Wales. He retired from rugby in October 2011.  “Thomas came out as gay in December 2009. The following year he was voted the most influential gay person in the UK in The Independent on Sunday Pink List and received Stonewall’s Hero of the Year award.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gareth_Thomas_(rugby,_born_1974)
item.dc:creator: oukid
